description: A safety-video analysis co-worker for reviewing local workplace footage. Put video files in the input folder; it stages them for the visual analysis node, identifies safety-relevant observations, and writes a structured safety report and supporting artifacts to the output folder.
name: Safety Video Analyser

product.agent_role: Video understanding and safety report team that validates smart node allocation across a desktop cluster.
product.benefit: Confirms large local videos can move by BlobRef to the model node while report generation can prefer a lighter local node.
product.customizable_for: Workplace safety review, video QA, facility operations, and cluster placement validation.
product.how_it_works: Stages local videos from the selected folder, schedules the VLM worker on a high-end NVIDIA node, routes structured video metadata to a report worker, and records a Markdown report.
product.output: Safety video metadata and Markdown report with placement/model routing evidence.
product.problem: Large video inputs should not travel through gRPC, and model-heavy agents should run near the right hardware while lighter agents can prefer weaker nodes.
product.simulation_type: Two-agent cross-node video analysis placement smoke test.
product.target_users: OtterDesk operators, cluster runtime developers, and safety operations teams.

description: A video-watch co-worker for monitoring an approved local or mapped video stream. Give it the stream source, visual targets, alert policy, and optional input folder assets; it detects configured objects or activities and writes reviewable observations, counts, positions, confidence, and alert status artifacts to the output folder.
name: Video Watch Assistant

product.agent_role: AI assistant for reviewing video stream activity and preparing visual detection alerts.
product.benefit: Helps reviewers notice configured visual targets faster while keeping the final access or safety decision with people.
product.customizable_for: Video monitoring, configurable visual detection, facility operations, and site safety workflows.
product.how_it_works: Samples the approved video stream, asks a vision model whether configured targets are visible, records observable detection details, applies cooldown policy, and prepares reviewable alerts.
product.input: Approved video stream, target prompt, alert thresholds, and notification settings.
product.output: Visual detection observations with count, label, category, color, position, activity, confidence, and alert status.
product.problem: Continuous video is hard to review manually; teams need a helpful assistant that flags likely configured visual targets with plain-language details.
product.simulation_type: Video stream sampling with visual detection review state.
product.target_users: Video operators, security reviewers, safety operations teams, and site-access coordinators.

description: A voice customer-service co-worker for a small business demo. Give it the business name, service scope, opening message, escalation rules, editable knowledge text, and optional sample/input folder; it starts a local WebRTC voice experience and writes service status, conversation logs, knowledge snapshots, and handoff-ready run artifacts to the output folder.
name: Pizza Order Voice AI Co-worker

product.agent_role: Pizza-ordering voice co-worker that answers from editable menu knowledge, helps collect an order, asks clarifying questions, and recommends human handoff when it is unsure or outside scope.
product.benefit: Lets an operator launch a local OtterDesk run, update plain-text pizza menu knowledge, and hand callers a localhost HTTPS voice link backed by the Spark NVIDIA stack.
product.customizable_for: Pizza shops, takeout counters, small restaurants, delivery intake, and friendly food-ordering demos.
product.how_it_works: Pre-launch prepares Spark and the shared NVIDIA stack, opens a localhost tunnel to the Spark voice service, and each turn retrieves relevant snippets from editable plain-text menu knowledge before answering.
product.input: Shop name, service scope, opening message, editable menu knowledge text, escalation policy, voice, Spark host, Spark HTTPS port, and local proxy port.
product.output: Localhost voice URL, service health, editable menu knowledge snapshot, conversation log, events, and final run artifact.
product.problem: Pizza shops need a friendly voice co-worker that can help callers place basic orders from editable menu knowledge while handing sensitive or uncertain calls to people.
product.simulation_type: Spark-hosted real-time WebRTC pizza-ordering conversation exposed through localhost with editable text RAG.
product.target_users: Restaurant operators, pizza shops, customer operations leads, small businesses, and AI operations teams.

description: A unified personal financial advisor co-worker. Put bank statements, receipts, bills, income records, W-2s, 1099s, tax-form images with answer files, brokerage statements, portfolio files, and related finance documents in the input folder; it extracts document evidence, captures tax-form OCR fields for review, prepares review-only tax and household finance summaries, runs portfolio risk analysis, and writes integrated advisor reports to the output folder.
name: Financial Advisor

product.agent_role: Integrated financial advisor team for bank statement extraction, tax-form OCR capture, household cash-flow review, draft tax workpapers, portfolio risk analysis, and review-only report writing.
product.benefit: Turns one local finance folder into a source-grounded advisor packet that combines statement, tax-form OCR, tax, cash-flow, and portfolio evidence before any human-approved downstream action.
product.customizable_for: Household finance review, bank statement extraction, tax-form OCR capture, tax document intake, freelancer finance organization, portfolio risk review, and advisor workbenches.
product.how_it_works: Reads a local folder, extracts statement and document evidence, captures tax-form image/answer-file fields, normalizes cash flow, routes tax documents into draft workpapers, loads portfolio context, computes deterministic risk metrics, uses privacy-safe public guidance, audits review boundaries, and writes an integrated report.
product.input: Local folder with bank statements, receipts, bills, income records, W-2s, 1099s, tax-form images with answer files, brokerage statements, optional portfolio JSON, and related finance documents.
product.output: Review-only financial_advisor_report with bank statement extraction, tax-form OCR capture, household finance summary, draft tax review packet, portfolio risk review, public guidance sources, and Markdown report output.
product.problem: Personal finance work is fragmented across statement review, tax preparation, household advice, and portfolio risk checks; users need one local assistant that keeps evidence and review boundaries together.
product.simulation_type: Unified local financial-advisor document workflow with deterministic finance math and review-only reporting.
product.target_users: Individuals, households, freelancers, financial coaches, tax preparers, and advisors reviewing personal finance folders.

description: A property deal research co-worker for comparing real-estate opportunities. Give it a target ZIP code, price ceiling, deal history, memory policy, optional broker notes, financing constraints, and an input folder for supporting files; it researches and scores opportunities, explains tradeoffs, and writes ranked review artifacts to the output folder.
name: Property Deal Research Assistant

product.agent_role: AI assistant for researching property deals and drafting opportunity rankings.
product.benefit: Helps acquisition teams surface stronger property opportunities while keeping investment decisions reviewable.
product.customizable_for: Rental acquisitions, flipping pipelines, multifamily sourcing, market expansion, diligence review, and capital-allocation meetings.
product.how_it_works: Retrieves relevant deal and ZIP-code history, scores opportunities, and drafts a clear recommendation with supporting context.
product.input: Property pipeline data, ZIP-code history, broker notes, financing constraints, and prior investment decisions.
product.output: Ranked property opportunities, source-grounded notes, and watchlist or bid recommendations for review.
product.problem: Property deal review depends on older broker, lender, rent, insurance, and diligence details that are easy to lose in noisy pipelines.
product.simulation_type: Property opportunity research with deal-memory retrieval.
product.target_users: Real-estate investors, acquisition analysts, property-tech teams, and diligence operators.

description: A VC analysis co-worker for early startup screening reports. Put pitch decks, memos, financial snippets, company folders, or other startup documents in the input folder; it groups documents by company, performs privacy-safe public research, applies seven VC heuristic scoring methods, audits the math and evidence, and writes score-only per-company reports and batch indexes to the output folder.
name: VC Assistant

product.agent_role: VC analysis coworker that prepares source-grounded score reports without issuing investment decisions.
product.benefit: Turns mixed startup document packets into organized per-company heuristic reports, method-score files, research ledgers, and batch coverage summaries so the user can decide what deserves deeper diligence.
product.customizable_for: Pre-seed screening, accelerator batches, angel deal flow, founder note review, and early diligence packet triage.
product.how_it_works: On each scheduled batch run, checks a local folder, groups documents by company, extracts source evidence, normalizes deterministic fact tables, runs staged browser research, applies seven specialist numerical scorers in parallel, audits score consistency, and writes per-company and batch-level reports.
product.input: Local folder with one or more startup document packets, preferably grouped by first-level company folders.
product.output: Per-company analysis folders with scores, evidence, assumptions, public source refs, and missing-evidence flags.
product.problem: Early startup review is noisy; analysts need a quick score-only report across common VC heuristics without fake precision or automated decisions.
runtime_features: Crunchbase and public profile verification planning
product.simulation_type: Scheduled batch startup packet review with score-only VC heuristic reports.
product.target_users: VC analysts, angel investors, accelerator reviewers, startup scouts, and founder-led investment teams.

description: A research co-worker for early drug-discovery triage. Give it a disease or target profile, screening criteria, optional candidate seeds, literature notes, and an input folder for supporting files; it stages an evidence-backed discovery workflow and writes review-ready candidate summaries, scores, assumptions, risks, and source notes to the output folder.
name: Drug Discovery Research Assistant

product.agent_role: AI assistant for organizing drug discovery candidate generation, filtering, and evidence review.
product.benefit: Helps research teams keep candidate discovery organized across repeated generate, score, extract, and review stages.
product.customizable_for: Drug discovery, material search, assay planning, scientific literature review, and research pipeline support.
product.how_it_works: Coordinates staged research tasks that generate candidates, evaluate evidence, extract artifacts, and summarize progress for review.
product.input: Target profile, assay or screening criteria, scientific constraints, and optional literature or candidate seeds.
product.output: Candidate artifacts, stage logs, evidence notes, and discovery summaries for researcher review.
product.problem: Discovery work is iterative and evidence-heavy; researchers need an assistant that keeps candidate generation, scoring, extraction, and review moving in order.
product.simulation_type: Iterative scientific research workflow with staged candidate review.
product.target_users: Computational biology researchers, scientific AI platform teams, and research operations groups.

description: A legal document co-worker for invoice, bill, and contract review. Put invoices, bills, contracts, clause notes, labels, or supporting files in the input folder; it extracts payable fields, maps contract clauses, compares playbook expectations, flags review issues, and writes a source-grounded review packet to the output folder.
name: Legal Assistant

product.agent_role: Local legal document assistant that extracts invoice and contract evidence while keeping conclusions review-only.
product.benefit: Combines payable extraction and contract clause review into one local, source-grounded review packet.
product.customizable_for: Individual legal intake, small-business invoice review, vendor contract review, CLM intake, payable approval support, and attorney review preparation.
product.how_it_works: Stages a local document folder, extracts embedded text, flags OCR-required documents, extracts invoice fields, maps contract clauses, compares playbook expectations, and writes a human-review packet.
product.input: Invoices, bills, contracts, clause notes, labels, and supporting files.
product.output: Review-only legal_assistant_report with invoice extraction, contract clause review, issue register, action ledger, and Markdown report output.
product.problem: Personal and small-business legal work often mixes payable documents with contracts and obligations; users need one local review assistant that keeps invoice facts, contract clauses, evidence, and approval boundaries together.
product.simulation_type: Document automation workflow with local OCR and review-gated legal/payable extraction.
product.target_users: Individuals, founders, small-business operators, legal operations teams, in-house reviewers, and attorneys preparing first-pass document packets.

description: A medical de-identification co-worker for privacy review. Put clinical-style PDFs, labels, or bounding-box files in the input folder; it detects PHI/PII, extracts record fields, notes redaction risks, and writes a review-gated de-identification packet with evidence and warnings to the output folder.
name: Medical De-Identification Record Intake Assistant

product.agent_role: Local medical document OCR and de-identification team that prepares redaction evidence for human privacy review.
product.benefit: Turns sensitive document folders into source-grounded review packets while keeping OCR and extraction local.
product.customizable_for: Patient-record intake, clinical PDF redaction, medical BPO queues, research chart abstraction, and HIPAA-constrained document preprocessing.
product.how_it_works: Stages a local document folder, extracts embedded text, uses shared local LLM OCR when needed, extracts structured fields, validates against labels when available, and writes a human-review packet.
product.input: Synthetic medical PDFs with ground truth and bounding boxes
product.output: Review-only medical_deidentification_review_packet with evidence, confidence, next steps, and source references.
product.problem: Hospitals, clinics, health-tech vendors, clinical research teams, and medical BPOs need local OCR and de-identification of PHI-bearing records before downstream use.
product.simulation_type: Document automation workflow with local OCR and review-gated structured extraction.
product.target_users: Hospitals, clinics, health-tech vendors, clinical research teams, and medical document operations teams.
